summary: Real Dashboard via pilot, only the REST client faked: closed-pane 'e' must yield no SlugScreen (rejects an always-available editor); after 'd', 'e' must push a SlugScreen whose Input equals the current slug 'fix-widget' (rejects no-editor, empty-init, wrong-init); confirmed red today (SlugScreen unimplemented), proving non-tautology. Minor gap: closed-pane branch omits set_slugs == [], but a silent rename would need an editor the test asserts absent.
